extraction.one_line_summary: NIBALI Vincenzo won from a reduced sprint after FROOME Chris attacked 7km out on Alto de la Comella, only CHAVEZ Esteban followed initially
tactical_patterns: FROOME attacked on Alto de la Comella ascent (7km out) using Tour de France descent tactic, but was neutralized on downhill.
Team Sky set tempo from 40km out on Coll de Rabassa to control break, burning through leadout men early.
NIBALI launched late sprint from behind favorites group after descent regrouping, exploiting disorganization from earlier FROOME attack.

rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: lost 2.5+ minutes on first mountain stage, unable to follow Sky pace on Coll de Rabassa, podium ambitions dead
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: strong enough to attack Alto de la Comella with 7km out, took red jersey despite neutralization on descent
rider_signals.CHAVEZ Esteban: positive: only rider to immediately follow FROOME's attack on Comella, showing superior form among non-Sky GC contenders
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: finished second while doing Sky domestique work, suggesting exceptional form for deeper stage hunting
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: demonstrated superior technical sprint timing from reduced group despite uncomfortable climbing earlier
